title: Infrastructure as Code for Beginners (AWS CDK)
summary: A tutorial by AWS Developers on Infrastructure as Code using AWS CDK with Python to build a serverless REST API. The video demonstrates building the same architecture manually through the AWS console first, then using CDK to codify it, deploy it with one command, and tear it down. The course covers DynamoDB, Lambda, API Gateway, and CloudFormation generation.
